rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARRY A. BIRK III
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 27, 2019. new notice is required. the notice filed 10/21/19 shows notice mailed on 10/21/19 for 11/4/19, which is only 14 days notice and 15 days is required. in addition, with respect to PC 9202(b), the supplement states only that no heir or beneficiary is confined and the allegation must be whether either is or has been confined. a second supplement must be filed.
